ddls:
CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the product */,
  "product_type" TEXT /* Type/category of the product */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL pointing to the product page */,
  "price" REAL /* Current price of the product */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Current available quantity of the product */,
  "brand" TEXT /* Brand of the product */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the product */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the product */,
  "size" TEXT /* Size of the product */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the product */,
  "material" TEXT /* Material composition of the product */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Category ID of the product */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the product */,
  "warranty_period" TEXT /* Warranty period of the product */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Whether the product is currently active or not */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the product was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer placing the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date when the order was placed */,
  "total_amount" REAL /* Total amount of the order */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the order (e.g., pending, completed) */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used for the order */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Shipping address for the order */,
  "billing_address" TEXT /* Billing address for the order */,
  "shipping_method" TEXT /* Shipping method used for the order */,
  "order_source" TEXT /* Source of the order (e.g., website, mobile app) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the order was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date when the customer registered on the platform */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Primary address of the customer */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the customer's address */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the customer's address */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the customer's address */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the customer's address */,
  "is_subscribed" INTEGER /* Whether the customer is subscribed to the newsletter */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the customer (e.g., referral, ad, organic) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the customer registered */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the customer information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order to which this item belongs */,
  "product_id" TEXT /* ID of the product ordered */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product ordered */,
  "price" REAL /* Price for the ordered product */,
  "discount_amount" REAL /* Discount amount applied to the item */,
  "tax_amount" REAL /* Tax amount for the item */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the order item was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the order item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "product_id" TEXT /* ID of the product being reviewed */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who wrote the review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the customer (1-5 stars) */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Text comment by the customer */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was submitted */,
  "is_approved" INTEGER /* Whether the review has been approved for display */,
  "helpful_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the review has been marked as helpful */,
  "unhelpful_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the review has been marked as unhelpful */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the review was submitted */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory record */,
  "product_id" TEXT /* ID of the product in inventory */,
  "stock_level" INTEGER /* Current stock level available for the product */,
  "restock_date" TEXT /* Date when the product was last restocked */,
  "warehouse_id" INTEGER /* ID of the warehouse where the inventory is stored */,
  "last_checked_date" TEXT /* Date of the last physical inventory check */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the inventory record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the inventory record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category (for hierarchical category structure) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the category was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_categories_parent_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "discounts" (
  "discount_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each discount */,
  "product_id" TEXT /* ID of the product to which the discount applies */,
  "discount_percentage" REAL /* Percentage discount to be applied */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the discount period */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the discount period */,
  "minimum_quantity" INTEGER /* Minimum quantity required for the discount to apply */,
  "maximum_quantity" INTEGER /* Maximum quantity for which the discount can be applied */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the discount was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the discount */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("discount_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_discounts_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)
